facts.summary: Three recent issues mention confusion around first-run setup; quickstart likely needs a shorter path.

facts.title: How should I schedule a loop in GitHub Actions?
facts.summary: A useful community question is unanswered; draft an answer but ask before posting publicly.
Release checklist has docs and connector example still open; no public date should be promised yet.
First-time contributor has a small docs PR waiting for maintainer response for 3 days.
